metadata.description: Local GPU value and thermal guide built for Jimms Part Picker using current benchmark hierarchies and value guides.

sources.name: Tom's Hardware GPU Benchmarks Hierarchy 2026
sources.note: Relative gaming performance hierarchy and current market observations.

sources.name: TechSpot Best GPUs - Early 2026
sources.note: Current price-bracket value recommendations and cost-per-frame guidance.

sources.name: TechSpot GPU Database
sources.note: Broad model coverage for core specs and current market context.

gpus.name: Arc B570
gpus.valueSummary: Budget card with decent value if priced close to entry-level options.
gpus.notes: Reasonable entry card, but usually overshadowed by Arc B580 when the gap is small.

gpus.name: Arc B580
gpus.valueSummary: One of the strongest lower-midrange value cards when pricing stays near 250 euros.
gpus.notes: Frequently recommended as a good budget buy if driver maturity is acceptable for the buyer.

gpus.name: RTX 3050
gpus.valueSummary: Generally poor value in the modern market.
gpus.notes: Usually not worth buying unless deeply discounted.

gpus.name: RTX 3060
gpus.valueSummary: Still usable, but only decent value when aggressively priced.
gpus.notes: Can make sense if much cheaper than newer 8GB alternatives.

gpus.name: RTX 4060
gpus.valueSummary: Efficient and cool, but often not class-leading on raw value.
gpus.notes: Good small-build card, but 8GB VRAM limits long-term value.

gpus.name: RTX 4060 Ti
gpus.valueSummary: Technically efficient, but weaker value than AMD rivals at many prices.
gpus.notes: 8GB versions age poorly at higher prices.

gpus.name: RTX 5060
gpus.valueSummary: Efficient mainstream card, but usually beaten on value by AMD's closest rival.
gpus.notes: Fine card, just often not the price/performance winner.

gpus.name: RTX 5060 Ti
gpus.valueSummary: Strong all-rounder, but usually loses on value to RX 9060 XT 16GB.
gpus.notes: Better as a feature-led buy than a pure value buy.

gpus.name: RTX 5070
gpus.valueSummary: Competitive card, but value is usually slightly behind RX 9070.
gpus.notes: 12GB VRAM weakens long-term value versus 16GB competitors.

gpus.name: RTX 5070 Ti
gpus.valueSummary: Fast, but often poor value if RX 9070 XT pricing is close to MSRP.
gpus.notes: Usually a premium pick rather than the smart value choice.

gpus.name: RTX 5080
gpus.valueSummary: High-end performance, but poor price/performance in the current market.
gpus.notes: Commonly called out as a bad value buy at current pricing.

gpus.name: RTX 5090
gpus.valueSummary: Top-end halo product, bought for absolute speed rather than value.
gpus.notes: Not a value product, but unmatched if budget is unlimited.

gpus.name: RX 7600
gpus.valueSummary: Playable 1080p card, but usually weaker value than nearby Intel or newer AMD options.
gpus.notes: Not usually the best buy unless pricing drops noticeably.

gpus.name: RX 7700 XT
gpus.valueSummary: Can be decent value when discounted, but newer cards often make it a tougher sell.
gpus.notes: More situational value than automatic recommendation.

gpus.name: RX 7800 XT
gpus.valueSummary: Still a strong 16GB value card when priced close to midrange Nvidia rivals.
gpus.notes: Often a better long-term gaming value than 12GB competitors.

gpus.name: RX 7900 GRE
gpus.valueSummary: Usually a good raster value if it lands near older sale pricing.
gpus.notes: Great on pure gaming value; less exciting for heavy RT buyers.

gpus.name: RX 7900 XTX
gpus.valueSummary: High-end AMD card that can still look good on value against expensive Nvidia alternatives.
gpus.notes: Usually better value than top-end GeForce options if ray tracing is not the priority.

gpus.name: RX 9060 XT
gpus.valueSummary: One of the best mainstream value GPUs, especially in 16GB form.
gpus.notes: 8GB versions are less attractive; 16GB version is the easy recommendation.

gpus.name: RX 9070
gpus.valueSummary: Excellent upper-midrange value with 16GB VRAM and strong raster performance.
gpus.notes: Usually the smarter buy than RTX 5070 at similar local pricing.

gpus.name: RX 9070 XT
gpus.valueSummary: One of the standout high-end value GPUs when found near MSRP.
gpus.notes: Commonly singled out as the best pure gaming value in the upper tier.
